conditions.message: The new tracker records explicitly avoid launch-scope gaming and encode fail-closed behavior instead of allowing Spark or a future command to waive gate results.

project-readiness-kit-qhqa description says POST-LAUNCH, not in D-OSL-19 launch scope, and do not wire to the preflip gate.
The 95t2 description requires escalate-do-not-judge and hard stop points for hash mismatch, dirty index/peer dirt, verifier disagreement or fail/unknown, test failure, and unpredicted state.
The qhqa description specifies a fail-closed gate run with explicit stop points for hash mismatch, verifier disagreement or fail/unknown cells, dirty index/peer dirt, and test failure.
The staged preflip gate record does not include dependencies on project-readiness-kit-95t2 or project-readiness-kit-qhqa.
